title: sparqr sparc.config.yaml
description: Schema for the per-project sparqr configuration file.

board.description: Name of the Hermes Kanban board this project uses.

hitl_adapter.description: Which HITL adapter to use for human-in-the-loop reviews.

stages.description: Override the default stage set. Each entry is a stage name.

profiles.description: Override the per-stage Hermes profile. Key is the stage name. The 'reviewer' key is the reviewer profile (HITL gate, separate from the 6 stage profiles).

models.description: Per-stage model routing. Key is the stage name; value is the model ID (e.g. 'anthropic/claude-haiku-4').

gates.description: Per-stage gate configuration. Each gate decides whether a stage's output needs human review.

type.description: Gate type. 'approval' (default) always requires human review. 'confidence' auto-approves if reviewer confidence >= threshold. 'sampling' reviews N% of outputs. 'exception' auto-approves unless reviewer flags a problem.

threshold.description: For confidence gates: auto-approve if reviewer confidence >= this value (0-1). Default 0.9.

percent.description: For sampling gates: review this percentage of outputs (0-100). Default 10.

reconciler.description: Configuration for the artifact reconciler daemon (v0.3.0 story 6). The reconciler syncs disk artifacts to kanban comment threads periodically.

enabled.description: Whether the reconciler is enabled. Default: false (opt-in).

artifact_dir.description: Where to look for artifact files on disk. Default: ./docs/sparc

notify.description: Notification channels (v0.4.0). Auto-detected from env: log + kanban are always on; discord/telegram/slack/signal require credentials. See docs/COMMANDS.md § notify channels for setup.

channels.description: Restrict to a subset of channels. Default: all available (probed at runtime). Useful for project-specific overrides (e.g., a CI project that only wants kanban + log, no chat).

events.description: Which events to notify on. Default: ['hitl-review']. More events (stage-done, stage-failed) coming in v0.4.1.
